inputs.name: manifest_patch_request
inputs.description: Requested beat-level mutation or regeneration change produced by the editor or project copilot.

inputs.name: beat_context
inputs.description: Current beat, neighboring beats, arc role, approved state, and active fingerprint data.

inputs.name: revision_note
inputs.description: The specific operator intent explaining what should change and why.

derived_features.description: Measures whether the regeneration note resolves to specific change dimensions instead of vague aesthetic drift.
Classifies whether the requested change strengthens tension, vulnerability, or recognition for the target beat.
Measures whether the requested patch stays inside a coherent mutation scope rather than creating broad undefined changes.
Counts unintended differences outside the target beat or approved mutation window.

detection_modes.activation_rule: Activate when the regeneration exists to restore surprise, contrast, or turn energy that the current beat lacks.
Activate when the regeneration exists to recover intimacy, warmth, softness, or emotional cost signaling.
Activate when the regeneration exists to replace generic imagery with more specific, culturally accurate, or lived detail.

laws.name: Saturation Before Generation
laws.purpose: Block vague regeneration requests that are not grounded in a specific failure or revision note.

checks.repair_hint: Name the exact dimension that should change before regeneration is accepted.

laws.name: Three-Mode Emotional Detection
laws.purpose: Require the regeneration to preserve or strengthen the intended emotional role of the target beat.

checks.repair_hint: Map the revision note to the beat's real emotional function before regenerating.

laws.name: Compression, Not Elimination
laws.purpose: Ensure the patch resolves to a small controlled mutation set instead of broad manifest drift.

checks.repair_hint: Reduce the patch to the target beat and the minimum dependent fields required for continuity.

laws.name: Unpredictability Gate
laws.purpose: Allow novelty inside the target beat while forbidding random drift outside the approved mutation scope.

checks.repair_hint: Preserve all non-target beats and approved neighbors; novelty belongs only in the requested beat.
